CustomField.formula:
IF( Qualification_Score__c >= 91,
IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25),
IF( Qualification_Score__c >= 76,
IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedStar/red_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/RedOutlineStar/red_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25),
IF( Qualification_Score__c >= 51,
IMAGE("/resource/OrangeStar/orange_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/OrangeStar/orange_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/OrangeStar/orange_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/OrangeOutlineStar/orange_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/OrangeOutlineStar/orange_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25),
IF( Qualification_Score__c >= 26,
IMAGE("/resource/BlueStar/blue_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueStar/blue_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25),
IMAGE("/resource/BlueStar/blue_star.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) & IMAGE("/resource/BlueOutlineStar/blue_star_outline.png", "Star", 25, 25) ))))
CustomField.label: Case Quality Display
